text:
First, note that time zones as we know them did not exist in 1341.  
But for the purpose of this exercise, we assume modern time zone definitions apply anachronistically.

Asia/Tokyo = UTC+9  
US/Hawaii = UTC-10  

Time difference = 9 - (-10) = 19 hours behind Tokyo.

2:00 in Tokyo → subtract 19 hours:  
2:00 - 19 hours = previous day 7:00 (24-hour format: 07:00 on March 21).

FINAL_ANSWER: March 21, 07:00
